org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Interface SimulationClock

  • Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public interface SimulationClock
    Simulation clock that permits to obtain the simulation time.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      double getSimulationStepDuration()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.
      double getSimulationStepDuration(TimeUnit desired_unit)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.
      double getSimulationTime()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the current date of simulation.
      double getSimulationTime(TimeUnit desired_unit)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the current date of simulation.
      double perTimeUnit(double value)
      Deprecated. 
      Compute a value expressed in something per time unit into something per simulation loop.
      double perTimeUnit(double value, TimeUnit desiredUnit)
      Deprecated. 
      Compute a value expressed in something per time unit into something per simulation loop.

    • Method Detail

      • getSimulationTime

        double getSimulationTime(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.
        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in the specified unit.

      • getSimulationTime

        double getSimulationTime()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the current date of simulation.

        The unit depends on the environment's implementation.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Returns:
        the simulation's time espressed in seconds.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        double getSimulationStepDuration(TimeUnit desired_unit)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Parameters:
        desired_unit - indicates the unit to use
        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.

      • getSimulationStepDuration

        double getSimulationStepDuration()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration of a simulation loop for this environment.

        simulation_time(t+1) = simulation_time(t) + step_duration

        Returns:
        the simulation's step time.

      • perTimeUnit

        double perTimeUnit(double value)
        Deprecated. 
        Compute a value expressed in something per time unit into something per simulation loop.

      • perTimeUnit

        double perTimeUnit(double value,
                 TimeUnit desiredUnit)
        Deprecated. 
        Compute a value expressed in something per time unit into something per simulation loop.
